# Dolphoon

> Dolphoon is a kids' edutainment platform offering interactive stories, educational courses, skill paths, and games for children ages 8–16, with content in Arabic, English, and French.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Dolphoon — stories, courses, skill paths, and games for kids.
- [Courses](/courses): Educational courses on programming, AI, languages, and design designed for ages 8–16.
- [Skill Paths](/skill-paths): Structured learning journeys that combine multiple courses into progressive curricula.
- [Stories](/stories): Interactive stories crafted to engage children while teaching valuable lessons.
- [Games](/games): Educational games that make learning fun.
- [Subscription](/subscription): Premium plans for unlimited access to all content.

## Optional

- [Login](/login): Sign in to your account.
- [Register](/register): Create a new account.
